facebook.caption:
POV: you stop scrolling hotels and just book the beachfront one on Ông Lang.

Phu Quoc Eco Beach Resort sits right on the sand at ấp Ông Lang. Open-air restaurant, outdoor pool, spa, gym. 4.6 stars across 898 reviews.

Not the crowded south coast. Quieter stretch. Actual beach access.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Beachfront pool. Open-air dining. The quieter side of Phu Quoc. Phu Quoc Eco Beach Resort at ấp Ông Lang is doing things right. 4.6★ from 898 guests. Tag your travel buddy.

instagram.video_caption: Sand, pool, open-air dining. Phu Quoc Eco Beach Resort hits different when the beach is actually in front of you.
